# Third-party Notice

This workspace contains vendored third-party repositories and reference material for local analysis and integration work.

Included core vendors:
- gsd-2-main
- omlx-main
- Turbo-master

Included reference repos:
- open-multi-agent-main
- open-claude-cowork-master
- openclaw-composio-plugin-master
- awesome-mcp-servers-3-main

Leaked proprietary code is intentionally excluded from this combined artifact.
